title: Gore Edition
description: Mod focused on PvE and PvP combat, with VFX and SFX of retro gore.
body:
Incomplete mod that add retro gore and combat improvements to MInecraft, inspired in retro shooters games. Configuration files incluted.

Features:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Gore particles with multiples colours,
- Gore SFX
- Dismembered entities
- Corpses in 0.5 beta (unavaible)
- Weapons with gore FX 0.5 beta (unavaible)
- ᓭᒷᓵ∷ᒷℸ ̣  ᒷ ̇/ℸ ̣ ∷ᔑ ↸╎ᒲᒷリᓭ╎𝙹リᓭ (⚍リᔑ⍊ᔑʖ╎ꖎᒷ)

</details>



Credits (FreeSound):

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- FoolBoyMedia

For Minecraft older versions?

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

I can't port the mod to older versions, because MCreator plugins and MCreator features that doesn't exist in older MCreator versions. In each version of MCreator, there is a different versions of Minecraft, my MCreator version is 2024.2 in this moment. (1.20.1 Forge + 1.20.6 NeoForge)

</details>



Mod made with MCreator.
